channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: 49ers fire special teams coordinator Brian Schneider
item.description: The 49ers special team were a season-long problem. Coordinator Brian Schneider paid for it with his job.
item.dc:creator: Jerry McDonald, The Mercury News

item.title: The 49ers fire special teams coordinator Brian Schneider, AP source says
item.description: The San Francisco 49ers fired special teams coach Brian Schneider following a season when repeated blunders in the kicking contributed to a losing season, a person familiar with the decision told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Suns' Beal stars as a reserve in win over 76ers and makes it clear he believes he is an NBA starter
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Bradley Beal made the most of the unfamiliar role of substitute for the Phoenix Suns. That doesn't mean he had to like it.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: North Dakota State wins 10th FCS title as Miller accounts for 4 TDs in 35-32 win over Montana State
item.description: FRISCO, Texas (AP) — Cam Miller ran for two touchdowns and threw for two more in his 54th consecutive start as North Dakota State's quarterback, and the Bison won their record 10th Football Championship Subdivision title, beating top-seeded and previously undefeated Montana State 35-32 on Monday nig
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chargers plan to sign Ezekiel Elliott to practice squad after his release by Cowboys
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles Chargers are planning to sign running back Ezekiel Elliott to their practice squad pending a physical, two people familiar with the situation told The Associated Press on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sheel Seidler, wife of late Padres owner, sues in-laws for control of the team
item.description: The wife of late San Diego Padres owner Peter Seidler, Sheel Seidler, sued brothers-in-law Matthew and Robert on Monday, attempting to prevent another brother, John, from taking control of the team rather than her.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mavericks guard Kyrie Irving out due to bulging disk in his back, no timeline for return
item.description: Dallas guard Kyrie Irving is expected to miss one to two weeks with a bulging disk in his back, and Mavericks coach Jason Kidd said a timeline for his return was not immediately known.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Zac Blair tries to regain PGA Tour status
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The first full field event of the season on the PGA Tour, the Hawaiian Open, tees off on Thursday. Former BYU star Zac Blair flew out to Hawaii to try to Monday qualify because he no longer has full status on the tour.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers agree to trade Gavin Lux to Reds: report
item.description: The post World Series shakeup continues in Los Angeles, as the Dodgers are poised to trade starting second-baseman Gavin Lux to the Cincinnati Reds. As reported by ESPN's Jeff Passan, the Dodgers will send Lux to the Reds in exchange for a future draft pick and outfield prospect Mike Sirota.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Tennessee, nation's lone unbeaten, strengthens grip on No. 1; WVU, Michigan, Utah St enter AP Top 25
item.description: Tennessee tightened its grip on No. 1 in the AP Top 25 on Monday following a pair of lopsided wins, including one over SEC rival Arkansas, that left the Volunteers as the only undefeated team in men's Division I college basketball.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Emotions pour from McCaffrey, Ward, Pearsall as 49ers clear out lockers
item.description: Christian McCaffrey, Charvarius Ward and Ricky Pearsall are among the 49ers hit hard by the emotional tolls this past season.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: NFL coaching moves: Mayo, Pederson are out of a job while Giants elect to keep Daboll
item.description: New England's Jerod Mayo and Jacksonville's Doug Pederson are two NFL coaches who are out of a job, though a handful of other teams decided to stay with the status quo on a surprisingly quiet Monday following the regular season.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Tennis star Naomi Osaka says she and rapper Cordae are no longer in a relationship
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Four-time Grand Slam champion Naomi Osaka says she and her partner, rapper Cordae, “are no longer in a relationship.” Osaka posted the news on social media Monday, less than a week before the Australian Open tennis tournament begins. Osaka won that event in 2019 and 2021.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lions beat Vikings 31-9, win NFC North and No. 1 seed, dropping division rivals to No. 5
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Jahmyr Gibbs was the game-breaking player the Detroit Lions needed to get their high-powered offense in gear — and give them a first-round bye and home-field advantage in the NFC playoffs.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Buccaneers beat Saints 27-19 to clinch NFC South and wide receiver Mike Evans surpasses 1,000 yards
item.description: Baker Mayfield used his legs and arm to help the Tampa Bay Buccaneers clinch their fourth straight NFC South title while putting Mike Evans over 1,000 yards receiving.
item.dc:creator: Rob Maadi, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Fox Sports captures Saints' moment of silence in first game after deadly terror attack
item.description: Fox Sports captured the somber moment when the Tampa Bay Buccaneers and New Orleans Saints had a moment of silence for those killed in the terror attack on New Year's Day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: BYU gets trounced by #14 Houston 86-55
item.description: HOUSTON (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team came into the Big 12 season thinking it could compete with the top teams in one of the toughest leagues in the nation. But if Saturday was any indication, the Cougars have a long way to go.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Knicks visit conference foe Chicago Saturday
item.description: New York Knicks (24-11, third in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (15-19, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Knicks -5.5; over/under is 235.5 BOTTOM LINE: Chicago takes on New York in Eastern Conference action Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: St. Pete Pier hosts 'Raise the Flags Friday' ahead of Bucs' regular season finale
item.description: The Buccaneers are counting down to the finale of their regular season. Sunday's home game against the New Orleans Saints is a must-win for the team to secure a spot in the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Beth Rousseau, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Sugar Bowl postponed to Thursday night
item.description: Hours following the New Year's Day tragedy on Bourbon Street, Wednesday's Allstate Sugar Bowl bout between Notre Dame and Georgia is being postponed.
item.dc:creator: Richie Mills, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Saunders scores 30 as BYU wins Big 12 opener
item.description: PROVO, Utah (AP) - Richie Saunders scored a career-high 30 points and BYU cruised to a 76-56 victory over Arizona State on Tuesday in a Big 12 Conference opener.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Basketball: Montgomery 75, Windward 74
item.description: KUSI (SAN DIEGO)-Montgomery playing in the fifth place game on Monday afternoon went to overtime for bonus basketball against Windward and won 75-74. Lead by Senior, JJ Sanchez who poured in 27. While fellow senior Devin Hamilton added 18, and Alek Sanchez, twin of JJ hit for 12.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5
